_readme: Diff 18 scope — apply the neutral-17 rulings (David 2026-07-24) + TIPS_EXIST closure. PRACTICE: config class=Practice, direction=null; neutralise DB polarity where directional. OUTLIER: config class stays Level, direction=higher_is_better, DB polarity=higher_is_better, scale note as authored (RULING_SHEET_neutral17_2026-07-24.md). Scales NEVER inferred from option order. b1785613 was OUTLIER on the sheet -> ruled PRACTICE (direction error: longer employee notice RESTRICTS the employee). TIPS_EXIST already Practice (confirm + record closure).
